name: botnote
description: Agent-native tasks, notes, memory, and project context for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Tasks, notes, memory, and project context
interface.longDescription: Use botnote as the agent-native source of truth for projects, tasks, notes, and durable memory. The plugin bundles botnote MCP tools plus workflow skills for starting work, capturing tasks, remembering context, recalling notes, and marking work done.
